hair.description: Black hair — appears as foreground color on head/hair cells via half-block glyphs

subcell_fill.description: Yellow sub-cell rendering fill — used as background for half-block glyphs throughout the sprite (head, arms, edges). NOT a body part color; this is a rendering technique color that enables sub-cell detail via half-block characters

skin.description: Flesh tone for face, exposed arm edges, and neck transition

skin_detail.description: Dark red foreground on skin-bg cells for mouth/expression detail

shirt_primary.description: Purple torso garment fill — used as both fg and bg on shirt cells

pants_dark.description: Dark blue lower garment — appears as fg on pants cells and belt transition

outline.description: Black used for eyes, boot soles, and dark accents

regions.name: hair
regions.notes: Single cell hair cap at top of head. Glyph 220 (▄) creates half-block hair edge.

regions.name: face
regions.notes: Face cluster: eyes are glyph 34 (") on skin-bg, mouth is glyph 118 (v) with dark-red fg on skin-bg. Flanking cells (2,2) and (4,2) use black fg (hair) on yellow bg (subcell_fill).

regions.name: shirt
regions.notes: Torso region with shirt fill. Arm edge cells at (1,5) and (5,5) use skin fg on subcell_fill bg — these are transition cells where arms show through. Neck transition at (3,4) uses skin fg on shirt bg.

regions.name: pants
regions.notes: Leg region. Belt transition cell at (3,6) uses shirt_primary bg blending into pants_dark fg. Two separate leg cells at row 7 with gap between.

regions.name: boots
regions.notes: Glyph 223 (▀) with brown fg on black bg creates boot shape. Two boots with gap between matching leg gap above.

regions.name: face
regions.notes: Face identical to idle frame — confirms stable face region across idle/walk.

regions.name: shirt
regions.notes: Walk frame shifts right arm to (5,4) — arm position varies with pose but shirt fill colors remain stable.

regions.name: pants
regions.notes: Same region as idle. Walk frame shows leg separation with left leg at (2,7) transitioning to boot early.

regions.name: boots
regions.notes: Walk frame boots shift — left boot appears at (2,7) as transition cell with pants, and (2,8) shows subcell_fill/ground. Right boot at (4,8) remains standard. Walk poses create boot/pants mixing at row 7.

ambiguities: Arm cells at shirt edges (1,5) and (5,5) in idle use skin fg on subcell_fill bg — they belong to both 'skin' and 'shirt' semantically; recoloring shirt should NOT touch these arm cells
Belt transition cell (3,6) uses shirt_primary bg bleeding into pants_dark fg — a 'change shirt color' edit should include this cell's bg but a 'change pants color' edit should include this cell's fg
Walk frames shift arm and boot positions — semantic region bboxes are not perfectly stable across all 9 frames per angle

The #ffff55 yellow is a sub-cell rendering fill color, NOT hair — it appears as background on half-block cells throughout the sprite (head edges, arms, pants edges, boots). Hair is black (#000000). Do not treat #ffff55 as a recolorable body part.
Only frame 0 (idle) and frame 1 (walk start) are fully annotated; frames 2-8 share the same palette roles but region bboxes may shift by 1 cell
Other angle rows (1-7) have not been annotated — body region positions likely shift with viewing angle
